title: Open MPI LLM-friendly documentation manifest
description: Schema for openmpi-docs-manifest.json. The manifest is the single artifact that carries build identity, and it does not inventory itself. See specs/llms-friendly-docs/spec.md.

ompi_version.description: Open MPI version derived from the top-level VERSION file.

ompi_series.description: Open MPI documentation series, e.g. v6.1.x.

rtd_version_slug.description: Read the Docs version slug when available.

git_commit.description: Source commit used for the documentation build, when available.

generated_at.description: UTC generation timestamp (ISO 8601). Always present: derived from SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH when set, else the build commit date, else the tarball/build date.

artifacts.description: One entry per generated and curated artifact, EXCEPT the manifest itself.

path.description: Path relative to the published version root, e.g. llms/openmpi-mpi-api.jsonl.

url.description: Absolute published URL, when the URL base is known.

media_type.description: Media type, e.g. application/jsonl, text/markdown, application/json.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the artifact bytes (artifacts are wall-clock-free, so this is stable at a commit).

tokens_estimate.description: Estimated token count for the artifact.

symbols.description: Symbol names covered by the artifact, when applicable.

languages.description: Language/interface set covered by the artifact, when applicable.
